title: Iteration Protocols, Generators, and Lazy Evaluation
description: Process records larger than memory while exposing malformed rows at a controlled boundary. Learners cumulatively produce a bounded-memory lazy ingestion pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace iter, next, StopIteration, and single-pass iterator state exactly.
Explain generator suspension, local state retention, send points, and termination.
Measure memory and latency tradeoffs between eager and lazy transformation.
